# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build & Notifications

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, edited, ready_for_review]
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, edited, ready_for_review]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: read

env:
  CI: "true"

jobs:
  build_and_notify:
    name: Build + Notify (includes PR title/body)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    steps:
      - name: Capture PR metadata
        id: prmeta
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "number=${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "title<<'EOF'" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          printf '%s\n' "${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "body<<'EOF'" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          printf '%s\n' "${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "url=${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "ref=${{ github.head_ref }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "sha=${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "repo=${{ github.repository }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.sha }}
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Build (example)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Building PR #${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.number }}: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.title }}"
          echo "PR URL: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.url }}"
          echo "PR Description:"
          printf '%s\n' "${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.body }}"
          # Replace with your actual build steps:
          # npm ci
          # npm test
          # npm run build

      - name: Create build tracking commit message (for downstream deployment pipelines)
        id: tracking
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          subject="deploy(pr): #${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.number }} - ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.title }}"
          body=$(cat <<EOF
PR: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.url }}
Repo: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.repo }}
Ref: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.ref }}
SHA: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.sha }}

Description:
${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.body }}
EOF
          )
          echo "subject<<'EOF'" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          printf '%s\n' "$subject" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "body<<'EOF'" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          printf '%s\n' "$body" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Build notification payload (Slack/Teams/Custom webhook)
        id: notify
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          title="${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.title }}"
          desc="${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.body }}"
          url="${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.url }}"
          sha="${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.sha }}"
          pr="${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.number }}"
          repo="${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.repo }}"

          python - <<'PY' > payload.json
          import json, os
          payload = {
            "event": "pull_request_build",
            "repo": os.environ["REPO"],
            "pr_number": int(os.environ["PR"]),
            "pr_title": os.environ["TITLE"],
            "pr_description": os.environ.get("DESC",""),
            "pr_url": os.environ["URL"],
            "sha": os.environ["SHA"],
            "tracking_commit_subject": os.environ["SUBJECT"],
            "tracking_commit_body": os.environ["BODY"],
            "run_url": f"{os.environ['GITHUB_SERVER_URL']}/{os.environ['GITHUB_REPOSITORY']}/actions/runs/{os.environ['GITHUB_RUN_ID']}"
          }
          print(json.dumps(payload))
          PY
        env:
          TITLE: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.title }}
          DESC: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.body }}
          URL: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.url }}
          SHA: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.sha }}
          PR: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.number }}
          REPO: ${{ steps.prmeta.outputs.repo }}
          SUBJECT: ${{ steps.tracking.outputs.subject }}
          BODY: ${{ steps.tracking.outputs.body }}

      - name: Send webhook notification (includes PR title/description)
        if: ${{ secrets.BUILD_NOTIFICATIONS_WEBHOOK_URL != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          curl -sS -X POST \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            --data-binary @payload.json \
            "${{ secrets.BUILD_NOTIFICATIONS_WEBHOOK_URL }}"

      - name: Expose tracking commit message as outputs for reuse
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Tracking commit subject:"
          printf '%s\n' "${{ steps.tracking.outputs.subject }}"
          echo
          echo "Tracking commit body:"
          printf '%s\n' "${{ steps.tracking.outputs.body }}"
